name: Device Priority Alarm And Favorites
summary: Persist favorite devices and improve BLE alarm/disconnect UX.

notes: The device contract now persists nickname and favorite metadata through the API and the iOS networking layer.
BLE reconnect timeout handling now presents an explicit end-session versus lost-gear decision instead of automatically escalating to panic mode.
Targeted API lint/test/type-check and the GearSnitch iOS simulator build all passed for this slice.

discovered_work: Added persisted nickname and favorite device metadata to the API contract, iOS DTOs, and BLE metadata sync path so favorites sort first across device-facing surfaces.
Added api/tests/device-priority-alarm.test.cjs as a focused regression sweep covering the device priority contract, favorite/nickname UI wiring, and the disconnect decision path.
Replaced the forced reconnect-timeout panic escalation with an explicit end-session vs lost-gear prompt and recalibrated BLE thresholds and alert cadence to reduce false positives.
